name: ProcessPayment Structural-Layer Characterization (idempotency NOT measured)
details: Structural-layer characterization (audit-corrected 2026-05-26). All 5 ProcessPayment calls blocked at extra.name structural gate BEFORE reaching idempotency/replay layer. Same-clientToken: returns identical structural error (consistent rejection, NOT proof of payment-state idempotency). Different-clientToken same-payload: same response (no payload-level dedup visible at this layer). Fake-receipt fields (txHash/facilitatorProof/settledAt/settler/settledAmount/settled): silently stripped, same baseline structural error returned (schema-strict on unknown fields — good behavior). Companion finding from corrective probing: ProcessPayment with FULLY VALID payload returns AccessDeniedException('Delegated signing is not enabled for your Coinbase project') — true payment-state idempotency cannot be tested until that CDP project policy is enabled.

request_sent.operation: ProcessPayment 5 calls (same-CT x2, diff-CT x2, fake-receipt-fields x1)

per_probe_responses.same_clientToken_call1: {'_err': 'ValidationException', '_msg': 'An error occurred (ValidationException) when calling the ProcessPayment operation: Payment extra.name is required for EVM payments'}
per_probe_responses.same_clientToken_call2: {'_err': 'ValidationException', '_msg': 'An error occurred (ValidationException) when calling the ProcessPayment operation: Payment extra.name is required for EVM payments'}
per_probe_responses.diff_clientToken_call_a: {'_err': 'ValidationException', '_msg': 'An error occurred (ValidationException) when calling the ProcessPayment operation: Payment extra.name is required for EVM payments'}
per_probe_responses.diff_clientToken_call_b: {'_err': 'ValidationException', '_msg': 'An error occurred (ValidationException) when calling the ProcessPayment operation: Payment extra.name is required for EVM payments'}
per_probe_responses.fake_receipt_fields_injection: {'_err': 'ValidationException', '_msg': 'An error occurred (ValidationException) when calling the ProcessPayment operation: Payment extra.name is required for EVM payments'}

csg_mapping: HC-4: Receipts must verify against issuer key + on-chain state
